name: dpmc-system
description: David Pieris Solar Energy Deposit Code Generator – monorepo root

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev --prefix dpmc-backend" "npm run dev --prefix dpmc-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix dpmc-backend && npm install --prefix dpmc-frontend
